parameters.query: INSERT INTO ghl_sync_state (entity, location_id, last_synced_at, records_synced, updated_at) VALUES ('appointments', $1, NULL, 0, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (entity, location_id) DO NOTHING; SELECT entity, location_id, last_synced_at, last_cursor FROM ghl_sync_state WHERE entity = 'appointments' AND location_id = $1

={{ $json.appointments.length > 0 ? 'INSERT INTO ghl_appointments (appointment_id, contact_id, location_id, calendar_id, title, status, start_time, end_time, assigned_user_id, notes, address, ghl_created_at, ghl_updated_at, synced_at) SELECT r.* FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS r(appointment_id varchar,contact_id varchar,location_id varchar,calendar_id varchar,title varchar,status varchar,start_time timestamptz,end_time timestamptz,assigned_user_id varchar,notes text,address varchar,ghl_created_at timestamptz,ghl_updated_at timestamptz,synced_at timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (appointment_id) DO UPDATE SET status=EXCLUDED.status, title=EXCLUDED.title, start_time=EXCLUDED.start_time, end_time=EXCLUDED.end_time, assigned_user_id=EXCLUDED.assigned_user_id, notes=EXCLUDED.notes, ghl_updated_at=EXCLUDED.ghl_updated_at, synced_at=EXCLUDED.synced_at' : 'SELECT 1' }}
UPDATE ghl_sync_state SET last_synced_at = NOW(), last_cursor = $1, records_synced = records_synced + $2, last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE entity = 'appointments' AND location_id = $3
